entries.text: The Tortoise, you know, carries his house on his back.
entries.translation_zh: 你知道，乌龟背着他的房子。
entries.source_title: The Aesop for Children: Aesop Passage A

entries.text: They say that Jupiter punished him so, because he was such a lazy stay-at-home that he would not go to Jupiter's wedding, even when especially invited.
entries.translation_zh: 他们说朱庇特如此惩罚他，因为他是如此懒惰的宅家，以至于即使受到特别邀请，他也不会参加朱庇特的婚礼。
entries.source_title: The Aesop for Children: Aesop Passage A

entries.text: After many years, Tortoise began to wish he had gone to that wedding.
entries.translation_zh: 许多年后，乌龟开始希望自己没有去参加那场婚礼。
entries.source_title: The Aesop for Children: Aesop Passage A

entries.text: He wanted to see the world too, and there he was with a house on his back and little short legs that could hardly drag him along.
entries.translation_zh: 他也想去看看这个世界，而他的背上背着一座房子，小短腿几乎拖不动他。
entries.source_title: The Aesop for Children: Aesop Passage A

entries.text: But she went on all the same, shedding gallons of tears, until there was a large pool all round her, about four inches deep and reaching half down the hall.
entries.translation_zh: 但她还是继续说下去，流下了无数的眼泪，直到她周围出现一个大水池，大约四英寸深，延伸到大厅的一半。
entries.source_title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland: Alice Passage A

entries.text: After a time she heard a little pattering of feet in the distance, and she hastily dried her eyes to see what was coming.
entries.translation_zh: 过了一会儿，她听到远处传来轻微的脚步声，她赶紧擦干眼睛看看接下来会发生什么。
entries.source_title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland: Alice Passage B

entries.text: She was the kind of woman who would "stand no nonsense from young ones."
entries.translation_zh: 她是那种“不能忍受年轻人胡言乱语”的女人。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage A

entries.text: At least, that is what she would have said if she had been asked.
entries.translation_zh: 至少，如果有人问她的话，她会这么说。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage A

entries.text: She never dared even to ask a question.
entries.translation_zh: 她连问题都不敢问。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage A

entries.text: "Captain Lennox and his wife died of the cholera," Mr. Craven had said in his short, cold way.
entries.translation_zh: “伦诺克斯船长和他的妻子死于霍乱，”克雷文先生用他简短而冷酷的语气说道。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage A

entries.text: The child is to be brought here.
entries.translation_zh: 孩子要被带到这里来。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage A

entries.text: "She doesn't know where home is!"
entries.translation_zh: “她不知道家在哪里！”
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: Our grandmama lives there and our sister Mabel was sent to her last year.
entries.translation_zh: 我们的祖母住在那里，我们的妹妹梅布尔去年被送到她那里。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: You are not going to your grandmama.
entries.translation_zh: 你不会去你奶奶那里。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: I heard father and mother talking about him.
entries.translation_zh: 我听到爸爸和妈妈谈论他。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: He lives in a great, big, desolate old house in the country and no one goes near him.
entries.translation_zh: 他住在乡下一栋又大又大又荒凉的老房子里，没有人靠近他。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: He's so cross he won't let them, and they wouldn't come if he would let them.
entries.translation_zh: 他太生气了，他不让他们来，即使他让他们来，他们也不会来。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: She had a very pretty manner, too, and Mary has the most unattractive ways I ever saw in a child.
entries.translation_zh: 她的举止也非常漂亮，而玛丽的举止是我在孩子身上见过的最没有吸引力的。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: Mary made the long voyage to England under the care of an officer's wife, who was taking her children to leave them in a boarding-school.
entries.translation_zh: 玛丽在一位军官的妻子的照顾下长途航行到了英国，她带着她的孩子们把他们留在了寄宿学校。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: She was very much absorbed in her own little boy and girl, and was rather glad to hand the child over to the woman Mr. Archibald Craven sent to meet her, in London.
entries.translation_zh: 她非常专注于自己的小男孩和小女孩，并很高兴将孩子交给阿奇博尔德·克雷文先生派来伦敦接她的女人。
entries.source_title: The Secret Garden: Secret Garden Passage B

entries.text: Marilla felt that he wanted it just as much this morning as he had the night before, and that he would go on wanting it.
entries.translation_zh: 马瑞拉觉得他今天早上和前一天晚上一样想要它，而且他会继续想要它。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I'm better at looking after children, though.
entries.translation_zh: 不过我更擅长照顾孩子。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I've had so much experience at that.
entries.translation_zh: 我在这方面有很多经验。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: He didn't mind how much I talked--he seemed to like it.
entries.translation_zh: 他并不介意我说了多少——他似乎很喜欢。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: Take plenty of hot water, and be sure you dry them well.
entries.translation_zh: 准备充足的热水，并确保将它们充分擦干。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I've got enough to attend to this morning for I'll have to drive over to White Sands in the afternoon and see Mrs. Spencer.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上我有足够的事情要做，因为下午我必须开车去白沙去见斯宾塞夫人。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: You'll come with me and we'll settle what's to be done with you.
entries.translation_zh: 你跟我来，我们会商量如何处置你。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I mean just a name you gave it yourself.
entries.translation_zh: 我的意思只是你自己给它起的名字。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: Didn't you give it a name?
entries.translation_zh: 你没给它起名字吗？
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: May I give it one then?
entries.translation_zh: 那我可以给它一个吗？
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: May I call it--let me see--Bonny would do--may I call it Bonny while I'm here?
entries.translation_zh: 我可以叫它——让我想想——邦尼会吗——我在这儿的时候可以叫它邦尼吗？
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: It makes them seem more like people.
entries.translation_zh: 这让他们看起来更像人。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: You wouldn't like to be called nothing but a woman all the time.
entries.translation_zh: 你不希望一直被称为女人。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: Yes, I shall call it Bonny.
entries.translation_zh: 是的，我会叫它邦尼。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I named that cherry-tree outside my bedroom window this morning.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上我给卧室窗外的那棵樱桃树起了名字。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I called it Snow Queen because it was so white.
entries.translation_zh: 我称它为雪女王，因为它太白了。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: There Marilla left her until the early dinner was on the table.
entries.translation_zh: 玛丽拉离开了她，直到早饭上桌。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: I'll take Anne with me and Mrs. Spencer will probably make arrangements to send her back to Nova Scotia at once.
entries.translation_zh: 我会带安妮一起去，斯宾塞夫人可能会立即安排将她送回新斯科舍省。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage A

entries.text: "You don't have half such a hard time as I do," said Jo.
entries.translation_zh: “你的困难没有我一半多，”乔说。
entries.source_title: Little Women: Little Women Passage A

entries.text: And Beth looked at her rough hands with a sigh that any one could hear that time.
entries.translation_zh: 贝丝看着她粗糙的双手，叹了口气，当时任何人都能听到。
entries.source_title: Little Women: Little Women Passage A

entries.text: As for his antagonists, they seemed much agitated; not so much by the value of their stake, as because they had some scruples about betting under conditions so difficult to their friend.
entries.translation_zh: 至于他的对手，他们似乎很激动。与其说是因为他们的赌注价值，不如说是因为他们对在对他们的朋友来说如此困难的条件下下注有一些顾虑。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage A

entries.text: Like most quiet folks he liked talkative people when they were willing to do the talking themselves and did not expect him to keep up his end of it.
entries.translation_zh: 像大多数安静的人一样，他喜欢健谈的人，因为他们愿意自己说话，并且不希望他继续说下去。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: But he had never expected to enjoy the society of a little girl.
entries.translation_zh: 但他没想到会喜欢和一个小女孩交往。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: Women were bad enough in all conscience, but little girls were worse.
entries.translation_zh: 凭良心来说，女人已经够糟糕的了，但小女孩更糟糕。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: That was the Avonlea type of well-bred little girl.
entries.translation_zh: 那是埃文利类型的有教养的小女孩。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: But this freckled witch was very different, and although he found it rather difficult for his slower intelligence to keep up with her brisk mental processes he thought that he "kind of liked her chatter."
entries.translation_zh: 但这个长着雀斑的女巫却很不一样，尽管他发现自己较慢的智力很难跟上她敏捷的思维过程，但他认为自己“有点喜欢她的喋喋不休”。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: I know you and I are going to get along together fine.
entries.translation_zh: 我知道你和我会相处得很好。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: It's such a relief to talk when one wants to and not be told that children should be seen and not heard.
entries.translation_zh: 当一个人想说话的时候就可以说话，而不是被告知孩子应该被看到而不是被听到，这真是一种解脱。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: I've had that said to me a million times if I have once.
entries.translation_zh: 这句话我已经听过一百万次了（如果有的话）。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: And people laugh at me because I use big words.
entries.translation_zh: 人们嘲笑我，因为我用了大词。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: It's always been one of my dreams to live near a brook.
entries.translation_zh: 住在小溪附近一直是我的梦想之一。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: I never expected I would, though.
entries.translation_zh: 但我从没想过我会这么做。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: Dreams don't often come true, do they?
entries.translation_zh: 梦想通常不会成真，不是吗？
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: Wouldn't it be nice if they did?
entries.translation_zh: 如果他们这样做不是很好吗？
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: But just now I feel pretty nearly perfectly happy.
entries.translation_zh: 但现在我感觉几乎非常幸福。
entries.source_title: Anne of Green Gables: Anne Passage B

entries.text: There was so much to do, getting the boxes ready to go tomorrow, that I didn't come home to dinner.
entries.translation_zh: 有太多事情要做，要准备好明天要走的箱子，所以我没有回家吃晚饭。
entries.source_title: Little Women: Little Women Passage B

entries.text: The girls flew about, trying to make things comfortable, each in her own way.
entries.translation_zh: 女孩们飞来飞去，试图以自己的方式让一切变得舒适。
entries.source_title: Little Women: Little Women Passage B

entries.text: "This very evening," returned Phileas Fogg.
entries.translation_zh: “就在今天晚上，”菲利斯·福格回答道。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: We'll buy our clothes on the way.
entries.translation_zh: 我们会在路上买衣服。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: Passepartout tried to reply, but could not.
entries.translation_zh: 路路通试图回复，但无法回复。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: Around the world in eighty days!
entries.translation_zh: 八十天环游世界！
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: They were going to Dover; good!
entries.translation_zh: 他们要去多佛；好的！
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: After all, Passepartout, who had been away from France five years, would not be sorry to set foot on his native soil again.
entries.translation_zh: 毕竟，离开法国五年的路路通，再次踏上祖国的土地，不会感到遗憾。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: Perhaps they would go as far as Paris, and it would do his eyes good to see Paris once more.
entries.translation_zh: 也许他们会一直走到巴黎，再次见到巴黎对他的眼睛会有好处。
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: But surely a gentleman so chary of his steps would stop there; no doubt—but, then, it was none the less true that he was going away, this so domestic person hitherto!
entries.translation_zh: 但一位如此小心谨慎的绅士肯定会就此止步。毫无疑问——但是，话虽如此，他还是要离开，这个迄今为止如此居家的人！
entries.source_title: Around the World in Eighty Days: Around the World Passage B

entries.text: He bade me go and leave the door wide open.
entries.translation_zh: 他吩咐我走，把门敞开。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: "None of your keyholes for me, sonny," he said; and I left them together and retired into the bar.
entries.translation_zh: “儿子，你的钥匙孔不适合我，”他说。我把他们留在了一起，然后退进了酒吧。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: You may see the notch on the lower side of the frame to this day.
entries.translation_zh: 直到今天，您仍然可以在框架下侧看到凹口。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: That blow was the last of the battle.
entries.translation_zh: 那一击是战斗的最后一击。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: Once out upon the road, Black Dog, in spite of his wound, showed a wonderful clean pair of heels and disappeared over the edge of the hill in half a minute.
entries.translation_zh: 一上路，黑狗尽管受了伤，却露出了一双干净的高跟鞋，半分钟后就消失在山边了。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: Then he passed his hand over his eyes several times and at last turned back into the house.
entries.translation_zh: 然后他用手捂住眼睛好几次，最后才转身进屋。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: At the same instant my mother, alarmed by the cries and fighting, came running downstairs to help me.
entries.translation_zh: 与此同时，我的母亲被哭声和打斗声吓坏了，跑下楼来帮助我。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: Between us we raised his head.
entries.translation_zh: 我们在我们之间抬起了头。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: In the meantime, we had no idea what to do to help the captain, nor any other thought but that he had got his death-hurt in the scuffle with the stranger.
entries.translation_zh: 与此同时，我们不知道该怎么帮助船长，除了他在与陌生人的扭打中受重伤而死之外，我们也没有任何其他想法。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: I got the rum, to be sure, and tried to put it down his throat, but his teeth were tightly shut and his jaws as strong as iron.
entries.translation_zh: 当然，我拿到了朗姆酒，试图把它放进他的喉咙里，但他的牙齿紧闭，下巴坚如铁。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: It was a happy relief for us when the door opened and Doctor Livesey came in, on his visit to my father.
entries.translation_zh: 当门打开，利夫西医生进来探望我父亲时，我们感到很高兴。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: Now, Mrs. Hawkins, just you run upstairs to your husband and tell him, if possible, nothing about it.
entries.translation_zh: 现在，霍金斯太太，你跑上楼去找你丈夫，如果可能的话，什么也不告诉他。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: It was tattooed in several places.
entries.translation_zh: 它的几个地方都有纹身。
entries.source_title: Treasure Island: Treasure Island Passage A

entries.text: Now, I know that there are seventeen steps, because I have both seen and observed.
entries.translation_zh: 现在，我知道有十七个步骤，因为我既看到又观察。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage A

entries.text: "It came by the last post," said he.
entries.translation_zh: “这是最后一个帖子来的，”他说。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage A

entries.text: And when the party entered the assembly-room, it consisted of only five altogether: Mr. Bingley, his two sisters, the husband of the eldest, and another young man.
entries.translation_zh: 当一行人进入会议室时，总共只有五个人：彬格莱先生、他的两个姐妹、长子的丈夫和另一个年轻人。
entries.source_title: Pride and Prejudice: Pride and Prejudice Passage A

entries.text: I am lost without my Boswell.
entries.translation_zh: 没有我的博斯韦尔，我就迷失了。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: A slow and heavy step, which had been heard upon the stairs and in the passage, paused immediately outside the door.
entries.translation_zh: 楼梯上和过道上传来的缓慢而沉重的脚步声立刻在门外停了下来。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: Then there was a loud and authoritative tap.
entries.translation_zh: 然后是响亮而权威的敲击声。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: "I told you that I would call."
entries.translation_zh: “我说过我会打电话的。”
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: He looked from one to the other of us, as if uncertain which to address.
entries.translation_zh: 他看看我们中的一个，又看看另一个，似乎不确定该跟谁说话。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: "Pray take a seat," said Holmes.
entries.translation_zh: “请坐，”福尔摩斯说。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: I understand that this gentleman, your friend, is a man of honour and discretion, whom I may trust with a matter of the most extreme importance.
entries.translation_zh: 我知道这位先生，你的朋友，是一个有荣誉感和谨慎的人，我可以信任他来处理最重要的事情。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: I rose to go, but Holmes caught me by the wrist and pushed me back into my chair.
entries.translation_zh: 我起身要走，但福尔摩斯抓住了我的手腕，把我推回到椅子上。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: "It is both, or none," said he.
entries.translation_zh: “要么两者兼而有之，要么都没有，”他说。
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: "You may say before this gentleman anything which you may say to me."
entries.translation_zh: “你对我说的话都可以在这位先生面前说。”
entries.source_title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes: Sherlock Passage B

entries.text: Mr. Bingley inherited property to the amount of nearly a hundred thousand pounds from his father, who had intended to purchase an estate, but did not live to do it.
entries.translation_zh: 宾利先生从他父亲那里继承了近十万英镑的财产，他父亲原本打算购买一处庄园，但未能活着。
entries.source_title: Pride and Prejudice: Pride and Prejudice Passage B

entries.text: He did look at it, and into it, for half an hour; was pleased with the situation and the principal rooms, satisfied with what the owner said in its praise, and took it immediately.
entries.translation_zh: 他确实看了半个小时。对情况和正房很满意，对业主夸奖的话很满意，立即入住。
entries.source_title: Pride and Prejudice: Pride and Prejudice Passage B

entries.text: The Psychologist seemed about to speak to me, but changed his mind.
entries.translation_zh: 心理学家似乎想跟我说话，但后来改变了主意。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: Then the Time Traveller put forth his finger towards the lever.
entries.translation_zh: 然后时间旅行者将手指伸向控制杆。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: And turning to the Psychologist, he took that individual's hand in his own and told him to put out his forefinger.
entries.translation_zh: 然后转向心理学家，他握住那个人的手，让他伸出食指。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: So that it was the Psychologist himself who sent forth the model Time Machine on its interminable voyage.
entries.translation_zh: 因此，正是心理学家本人将时间机器模型送上了无尽的航程。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: I am absolutely certain there was no trickery.
entries.translation_zh: 我绝对确定没有任何诡计。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: There was a breath of wind, and the lamp flame jumped.
entries.translation_zh: 一阵风吹过，灯火跳动。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: Save for the lamp the table was bare.
entries.translation_zh: 除了台灯，桌子上空无一物。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: Then, getting up, he went to the tobacco jar on the mantel, and with his back to us began to fill his pipe.
entries.translation_zh: 然后，他站起来，走向壁炉架上的烟草罐，背对着我们开始给他的烟斗装满烟斗。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: Then he turned, lighting his pipe, to look at the Psychologist's face.
entries.translation_zh: 然后他转过身来，点着烟斗，看着心理学家的脸。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: "What is more, I have a big machine nearly finished in there"—he indicated the laboratory—"and when that is put together I mean to have a journey on my own account."
entries.translation_zh: “更重要的是，我那里有一台即将完工的大机器”——他指着实验室——“当它组装起来时，我打算独自进行一次旅行。”
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: "Would you like to see the Time Machine itself?"
entries.translation_zh: “你想看看时间机器吗？”
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: And therewith, taking the lamp in his hand, he led the way down the long, draughty corridor to his laboratory.
entries.translation_zh: 说完，他手里拿着灯，沿着通风良好的长走廊，来到了他的实验室。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: The thing was generally complete, but the twisted crystalline bars lay unfinished upon the bench beside some sheets of drawings, and I took one up for a better look at it.
entries.translation_zh: 东西基本上已经完成了，但是扭曲的水晶棒还没有完成，放在长凳上，旁边还有几张图纸，我拿起一张以便更好地观察它。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: The next Thursday I went again to Richmond—I suppose I was one of the Time Traveller's most constant guests—and, arriving late, found four or five men already assembled in his drawing-room.
entries.translation_zh: 下周四，我再次前往里士满——我想我是时间旅行者最常来的客人之一——到达较晚，发现四五个人已经聚集在他的客厅里。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: The Medical Man was standing before the fire with a sheet of paper in one hand and his watch in the other.
entries.translation_zh: 医生站在火边，一手拿着一张纸，另一只手拿着手表。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: I looked round for the Time Traveller, and—"It's half-past seven now," said the Medical Man.
entries.translation_zh: 我环顾四周寻找时间旅行者，然后——“现在已经七点半了，”医生说。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: "I suppose we'd better have dinner?"
entries.translation_zh: “我想我们最好吃晚饭吧？”
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: He asks me in this note to lead off with dinner at seven if he's not back.
entries.translation_zh: 他在这张便条中要求我如果他没有回来的话，就在七点开始吃晚饭。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage A

entries.text: Well, nobody could think of anything to do—everybody was stumped, and set still.
entries.translation_zh: 好吧，没有人想出什么办法——每个人都被难住了，一动不动。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: I was most ready to cry; but all at once I thought of a way, and so I offered them Miss Watson—they could kill her.
entries.translation_zh: 我快要哭了。但我突然想到了一个办法，于是我向他们提供了沃森小姐——他们可以杀了她。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: No; nobody ever saw anything in the books like that.
entries.translation_zh: 不;没有人在书中看到过这样的内容。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: So they all made fun of him, and called him cry-baby, and that made him mad, and he said he would go straight and tell all the secrets.
entries.translation_zh: 所以他们都取笑他，叫他爱哭鬼，这让他很生气，他说他会直接告诉他所有的秘密。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: But Tom give him five cents to keep quiet, and said we would all go home and meet next week, and rob somebody and kill some people.
entries.translation_zh: 但汤姆给了他五美分让他保持安静，并说我们下周都会回家见面，抢劫一些人，杀死一些人。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: They agreed to get together and fix a day as soon as they could, and then we elected Tom Sawyer first captain and Jo Harper second captain of the Gang, and so started home.
entries.translation_zh: 他们同意尽快聚在一起并确定一天，然后我们选举汤姆·索亚为帮派第一队长，乔·哈珀为帮派第二队长，然后就开始回家了。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: My new clothes was all greased up and clayey, and I was dog-tired.
entries.translation_zh: 我的新衣服沾满了油污，沾满泥土，我累坏了。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: Then Miss Watson she took me in the closet and prayed, but nothing come of it.
entries.translation_zh: 然后沃森小姐把我带到衣柜里祈祷，但没有任何结果。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: She told me to pray every day, and whatever I asked for I would get it.
entries.translation_zh: 她告诉我每天祈祷，无论我祈求什么，我都会得到。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: Once I got a fish-line, but no hooks.
entries.translation_zh: 有一次我得到了一条鱼线，但没有鱼钩。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: I tried for the hooks three or four times, but somehow I couldn't make it work.
entries.translation_zh: 我尝试了三四次钩子，但不知何故我无法让它发挥作用。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: By-and-by, one day, I asked Miss Watson to try for me, but she said I was a fool.
entries.translation_zh: 有一天，我请沃森小姐为我试一试，但她说我是个傻瓜。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: She never told me why, and I couldn't make it out no way.
entries.translation_zh: 她从来没有告诉过我原因，我也无法理解。
entries.source_title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Huckleberry Finn Passage A

entries.text: Among the many objects to which a wise and free people find it necessary to direct their attention, that of providing for their SAFETY seems to be the first.
entries.translation_zh: 在明智和自由的人们发现有必要关注的许多目标中，保障他们的安全似乎是首要的。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage A

entries.text: The SAFETY of the people doubtless has relation to a great variety of circumstances and considerations, and consequently affords great latitude to those who wish to define it precisely and comprehensively.
entries.translation_zh: 人民的安全无疑与各种各样的情况和考虑因素有关，因此为那些希望准确而全面地定义它的人提供了很大的自由度。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage A

entries.text: The JUST causes of war, for the most part, arise either from violation of treaties or from direct violence.
entries.translation_zh: 战争的正义起因在很大程度上要么源于违反条约，要么源于直接暴力。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage A

entries.text: America has already formed treaties with no less than six foreign nations, and all of them, except Prussia, are maritime, and therefore able to annoy and injure us.
entries.translation_zh: 美国已经与不少于六个国家签订了条约，而除普鲁士外，所有这些国家都是海上国家，因此能够骚扰和伤害我们。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage A

entries.text: She has also extensive commerce with Portugal, Spain, and Britain, and, with respect to the two latter, has, in addition, the circumstance of neighborhood to attend to.
entries.translation_zh: 她还与葡萄牙、西班牙和英国有广泛的贸易往来，对于后两者，她还需要注意邻里的情况。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage A

entries.text: Either this world is a κόσμος or comely piece, because all disposed and governed by certain order: or if it be a mixture, though confused, yet still it is a comely piece.
entries.translation_zh: 要么这个世界是一个 κόσμος 或美丽的部分，因为一切都由一定的秩序安排和支配；或者如果它是一个混合物，尽管混乱，但它仍然是一个美丽的部分。

entries.text: For is it possible that in thee there should be any beauty at all, and that in the whole world there should be nothing but disorder and confusion?
entries.translation_zh: 因为有可能在你身上有任何美丽，而在整个世界上除了无序和混乱之外什么都没有吗？

entries.text: Both those passions would lead them to countenance, if not to promote, whatever might promise to diminish her importance; and would also restrain them from measures calculated to advance or even to secure her prosperity.
entries.translation_zh: 这两种热情都会导致他们支持（如果不是提倡的话）任何可能削弱她重要性的事情。并且还会限制他们采取旨在促进甚至确保她的繁荣的措施。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage B

entries.text: She would soon begin, not only to lose confidence in her neighbors, but also to feel a disposition equally unfavorable to them.
entries.translation_zh: 她很快就会开始不仅对邻居失去信心，而且也会感到一种对他们同样不利的性格。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage B

entries.text: No sooner would this become evident than the NORTHERN HIVE would excite the same ideas and sensations in the more southern parts of America which it formerly did in the southern parts of Europe.
entries.translation_zh: 一旦这一点变得明显，北方蜂巢就会在美国南部地区激起与以前在欧洲南部地区相同的想法和感觉。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage B

entries.text: Close investigation, in most cases, will bring naturalists to an agreement how to rank doubtful forms.
entries.translation_zh: 在大多数情况下，仔细的调查将使博物学家就如何对可疑形式进行排序达成一致。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: Yet it must be confessed, that it is in the best-known countries that we find the greatest number of forms of doubtful value.
entries.translation_zh: 但必须承认，正是在最著名的国家，我们发现了最多数量的可疑价值形式。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: These varieties, moreover, will be often ranked by some authors as species.
entries.translation_zh: 此外，一些作者经常将这些变种列为物种。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: These differences blend into each other in an insensible series; and a series impresses the mind with the idea of an actual passage.
entries.translation_zh: 这些差异在一个不明显的系列中相互融合；一系列作品以真实段落的想法给人们留下深刻的印象。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: But we shall hereafter have to return to this subject.
entries.translation_zh: 但我们稍后将不得不回到这个话题。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: The term variety, again, in comparison with mere individual differences, is also applied arbitrarily, and for mere convenience sake.
entries.translation_zh: 同样，与单纯的个体差异相比，“多样性”一词也是任意使用的，并且仅仅是为了方便起见。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage A

entries.text: Venice, in later times, figured more than once in wars of ambition, till, becoming an object to the other Italian states, Pope Julius II.
entries.translation_zh: 在后来的时代，威尼斯不止一次地出现在野心战争中，直到成为教皇朱利叶斯二世（Pope Julius II）其他意大利国家的目标。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: In the government of Britain the representatives of the people compose one branch of the national legislature.
entries.translation_zh: 在英国政府中，人民代表组成国家立法机关的一个分支。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: Few nations, nevertheless, have been more frequently engaged in war; and the wars in which that kingdom has been engaged have, in numerous instances, proceeded from the people.
entries.translation_zh: 然而，很少有国家比它更频繁地卷入战争。在许多情况下，该王国所参与的战争都是由人民发起的。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: There have been, if I may so express it, almost as many popular as royal wars.
entries.translation_zh: 如果我可以这样表达的话，几乎和皇家战争一样受欢迎。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: It would be a full answer to this question to say--precisely the same inducements which have, at different times, deluged in blood all the nations in the world.
entries.translation_zh: 这将是对这个问题的完整回答——正是同样的诱因，在不同的时期，使世界上所有国家都陷入了鲜血之中。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: But, unfortunately for us, the question admits of a more particular answer.
entries.translation_zh: 但是，对我们来说不幸的是，这个问题有一个更具体的答案。
entries.source_title: The Federalist Papers: Federalist Passage C

entries.text: To-day the Oubliettes of Gargas are obstructed with the clay that it was impossible to carry elsewhere.
entries.translation_zh: 如今，加尔加斯的地牢被无法运往其他地方的粘土所堵塞。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage A

entries.text: The animals that I thus collected in the well were the following: The great bear (in abundance), the little bear (a variety of the preceding), the hyena, and the wolf.
entries.translation_zh: 我在井里收集的动物如下：大熊（大量）、小熊（前面的变种）、鬣狗和狼。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage A

entries.text: The pockets contained nearly entire skeletons of these species.
entries.translation_zh: 这些口袋里几乎装满了这些物种的整个骨骼。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage A

entries.text: How had the animals been able to penetrate this well?
entries.translation_zh: 动物们是如何钻进这口井的呢？
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage A

entries.text: It is difficult to admit that it was through the aperture that I have mentioned.
entries.translation_zh: 很难承认它是通过我提到的光圈进行的。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage A

entries.text: I stood up and looked round me.
entries.translation_zh: 我站起来环顾四周。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage B

entries.text: But all else of the world was invisible.
entries.translation_zh: 但世界上的其他一切都是看不见的。
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage B

entries.text: What might appear when that hazy curtain was altogether withdrawn?
entries.translation_zh: 当那层朦胧的帷幕完全拉开时，会出现什么？
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage B

entries.text: What might not have happened to men?
entries.translation_zh: 有什么事情可能不会发生在男人身上呢？
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage B

entries.text: What if cruelty had grown into a common passion?
entries.translation_zh: 如果残忍已经发展成为一种共同的激情怎么办？
entries.source_title: The Time Machine: Time Machine Passage B

entries.text: Flies, beetles, or even cockroaches, at the expiration of three or four days at most, disappear, nothing being left of them save their wings and other hard, parts of their bodies.
entries.translation_zh: 苍蝇、甲虫，甚至蟑螂，最多三四天后就会消失，除了翅膀和身体其他坚硬的部分外，什么也没有留下。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage B

entries.text: One of the simplest and surest modes of reaching this desirable end is to adopt a system of semi-tropical treatment for two months or so after flowering.
entries.translation_zh: 达到这一理想目标的最简单、最可靠的方式之一是在开花后采用两个月左右的亚热带处理系统。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage B

entries.text: The moment or even before the late blooms fade, the plants should be pruned if necessary.
entries.translation_zh: 如有必要，应在晚花凋谢时或什至之前对植物进行修剪。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage B

entries.text: Few plants bear the knife better than camellias, though it is folly to cut them unless they are too tall or too large for their quarters or have grown out of form.
entries.translation_zh: 很少有植物比山茶花更耐刀，不过除非山茶花太高或太大，或者已经长得不合适，否则砍它们是愚蠢的。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage B

entries.text: But if, in fact, all hermaphrodites do occasionally intercross with other individuals, the difference between hermaphrodites and unisexual species, as far as function is concerned, becomes very small.
entries.translation_zh: 但事实上，如果所有雌雄同体偶尔与其他个体杂交，那么就功能而言，雌雄同体和单性物种之间的差异就变得非常小。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage B

entries.text: Yucatan is, and has been for ages past, quite free from earthquakes, while all surrounding countries are from time to time convulsed.
entries.translation_zh: 尤卡坦半岛多年来一直没有发生地震，而周边国家却时不时发生地震。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: This immunity may be due to the vast caverns and numerous great wells existing throughout the land.
entries.translation_zh: 这种免疫力可能是由于这片土地上存在着巨大的洞穴和众多的大井。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: After him, other scientists who have carefully studied the subject have expressed the same opinion with regard to the efficacy of large wells.
entries.translation_zh: 在他之后，其他仔细研究该主题的科学家也对大井的功效表达了相同的观点。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: There are four pairs of false feet or suckers, which adhere to the ground by suction, and which disappear in the butterfly.
entries.translation_zh: 有四对假脚或吸盘，通过吸力粘附在地面上，并消失在蝴蝶体内。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: The wings derive their chief coloring from the covering of scales, which lie on like slates on a roof, and are attached in a similar manner.
entries.translation_zh: 翅膀的主要颜色来自于鳞片的覆盖，鳞片就像屋顶上的石板一样，并以类似的方式连接。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: A small portion of the wing magnified is represented at the bottom right hand corner, and detached scales more highly magnified next to it, exhibiting somewhat the form of battledoors.
entries.translation_zh: 机翼的一小部分被放大显示在右下角，旁边的分离鳞片被放大得更高，呈现出战门的形状。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: Another well known insect is illustrated in the figure in the upper portion--the peacock butterfly (Vanessa Io).
entries.translation_zh: 上图展示了另一种众所周知的昆虫——孔雀蝴蝶（Vanessa Io）。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: At the left-hand corner is seen the head of the insect, magnified, showing the long spiral tongue.
entries.translation_zh: 在左角可以看到放大的昆虫头部，显示出长长的螺旋舌头。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: In instances in which experiments have been made with fresh, raw beef or mutton, the meat has been covered in a few hours with the secretions of the leaves, and the blood extracted from it.
entries.translation_zh: 在用新鲜的生牛肉或羊肉进行实验的情况下，肉在几个小时内就被叶子的分泌物和从中提取的血液覆盖。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: There is, however, one difference between the digesting powers of the leaves when exercised upon insects or upon meat.
entries.translation_zh: 然而，当对昆虫或肉类进行叶子的消化能力时，它们之间存在一个差异。
entries.source_title: Scientific American Supplement, No. 508: Scientific American Passage C

entries.text: The term used in a wide sense.
entries.translation_zh: 该术语的使用范围很广。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Rapid increase of naturalised animals and plants.
entries.translation_zh: 归化动植物迅速增加。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Nature of the checks to increase.
entries.translation_zh: 检查性质增加。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Protection from the number of individuals.
entries.translation_zh: 保护免受人数的影响。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Complex relations of all animals and plants throughout nature.
entries.translation_zh: 自然界中所有动物和植物之间的复杂关系。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Struggle for life most severe between individuals and varieties of the same species; often severe between species of the same genus.
entries.translation_zh: 同一物种的个体和变体之间的生存斗争最为激烈；同一属的物种之间通常很严重。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: The relation of organism to organism the most important of all relations.
entries.translation_zh: 有机体与有机体的关系是所有关系中最重要的。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: A struggle for existence inevitably follows from the high rate at which all organic beings tend to increase.
entries.translation_zh: 所有有机生物的高速增长不可避免地会导致生存斗争。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: It is the doctrine of Malthus applied with manifold force to the whole animal and vegetable kingdoms; for in this case there can be no artificial increase of food, and no prudential restraint from marriage.
entries.translation_zh: 这是马尔萨斯的学说，以多方面的力量应用于整个动物和植物界。因为在这种情况下，就不能人为地增加食物，也不能审慎地限制婚姻。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Although some species may be now increasing, more or less rapidly, in numbers, all cannot do so, for the world would not hold them.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管某些物种的数量现在可能或多或少地迅速增加，但所有物种都不能这样做，因为世界容不下它们。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: In a state of nature almost every plant produces seed, and amongst animals there are very few which do not annually pair.
entries.translation_zh: 在自然状态下，几乎所有植物都会产生种子，而动物中也很少有不每年配对的。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Lighten any check, mitigate the destruction ever so little, and the number of the species will almost instantaneously increase to any amount.
entries.translation_zh: 减轻任何限制，稍微减轻破坏，物种的数量几乎会立即增加到任意数量。
entries.source_title: On the Origin of Species: Origin of Species Passage C

entries.text: Can you send me the photo later?
entries.translation_zh: 你晚点能把照片发给我吗？

entries.text: I left my keys on the kitchen table.
entries.translation_zh: 我把钥匙落在厨房桌上了。

entries.text: Let's meet at the coffee shop at three.
entries.translation_zh: 我们三点在咖啡店见吧。

entries.text: The bus was late again this morning.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上公交车又晚点了。

entries.text: She likes to cook dinner with her father.
entries.translation_zh: 她喜欢和爸爸一起做晚饭。

entries.text: Please turn off the lights before you leave.
entries.translation_zh: 离开前请把灯关掉。

entries.text: My phone battery is almost dead.
entries.translation_zh: 我手机快没电了。

entries.text: We watched a funny movie last night.
entries.translation_zh: 我们昨晚看了一部很好笑的电影。

entries.text: Do you want some milk in your tea?
entries.translation_zh: 你的茶里要加点牛奶吗？

entries.text: He walks his dog in the park every day.
entries.translation_zh: 他每天都在公园里遛狗。

entries.text: The store is open until nine every day.
entries.translation_zh: 这家店每天营业到九点。

entries.text: I need to buy a gift for my friend.
entries.translation_zh: 我需要给朋友买份礼物。

entries.text: It looks like it will rain this afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 看起来今天下午要下雨。

entries.text: Could you open the window a little bit?
entries.translation_zh: 你能把窗户开一点吗？

entries.text: They are moving to a new house next week.
entries.translation_zh: 他们下周要搬进新房子。

entries.text: This food has a little too much salt for me.
entries.translation_zh: 这食物对我来说盐放得有点多。

entries.text: Don't forget to bring your water bottle.
entries.translation_zh: 别忘了带上你的水瓶。

entries.text: The train station is ten minutes from here.
entries.translation_zh: 火车站离这里十分钟路程。

entries.text: I usually get up at seven on school days.
entries.translation_zh: 上学的日子我通常七点起床。

entries.text: Her little brother is learning to ride a bike.
entries.translation_zh: 她的弟弟正在学骑自行车。

entries.text: We had rice and fish for lunch today.
entries.translation_zh: 我们今天午饭吃了米饭和鱼。

entries.text: Can I use your phone for a minute?
entries.translation_zh: 我能用一下你的手机吗？

entries.text: The weather is perfect for a walk today.
entries.translation_zh: 今天的天气很适合散步。

entries.text: He scored two goals in the game yesterday.
entries.translation_zh: 他在昨天的比赛中进了两个球。

entries.text: My mother asked me to pick up some bread on my way home from school.
entries.translation_zh: 妈妈让我放学回家路上买点面包。

entries.text: We are planning a small party for my sister because she just finished her exams.
entries.translation_zh: 我们打算给妹妹办个小派对，因为她刚考完试。

entries.text: The teacher said we should read the first two chapters before the next class.
entries.translation_zh: 老师说我们应该在下节课前读完前两章。

entries.text: I tried to call you twice last night, but your phone was turned off.
entries.translation_zh: 昨晚我给你打了两次电话，但你的手机关机了。

entries.text: If the weather is nice on Saturday, we can ride our bikes to the lake.
entries.translation_zh: 如果周六天气好，我们可以骑车去湖边。

entries.text: She keeps a small notebook to write down new words she learns every day.
entries.translation_zh: 她随身带个小本子，记下每天学到的新单词。

entries.text: The supermarket near our house is having a big sale on fruit this week.
entries.translation_zh: 我们家附近的超市这周水果大减价。

entries.text: My grandfather likes to tell us stories about his life when he was young.
entries.translation_zh: 爷爷喜欢给我们讲他年轻时的故事。

entries.text: Please remember to feed the cat and water the plants while we are away.
entries.translation_zh: 我们不在的时候，请记得喂猫和浇花。

entries.text: It took us almost two hours to clean the whole apartment this morning.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上我们花了将近两个小时打扫整个公寓。

entries.text: He was so sleepy after practice that he went to bed right after dinner.
entries.translation_zh: 训练后他太困了，吃完晚饭就上床睡觉了。

entries.text: The children built a small castle out of sand and were very proud of it.
entries.translation_zh: 孩子们用沙子堆了一座小城堡，非常自豪。

entries.text: Could you help me carry these bags upstairs before you go out to play?
entries.translation_zh: 你出去玩之前能帮我把这些袋子搬上楼吗？

entries.text: We missed the first ten minutes of the movie because of the heavy traffic.
entries.translation_zh: 因为堵车，我们错过了电影的前十分钟。

entries.text: My best friend moved to another city, but we still talk online every weekend.
entries.translation_zh: 我最好的朋友搬去了另一个城市，但我们每个周末还在网上聊天。

entries.text: The doctor told him to drink more water and get at least eight hours of sleep.
entries.translation_zh: 医生让他多喝水，每天至少睡八个小时。

entries.text: I want to save some money this year so I can buy a new bicycle.
entries.translation_zh: 我今年想存点钱，好买一辆新自行车。

entries.text: There is a new student in our class, and she comes from a small town.
entries.translation_zh: 我们班来了个新同学，她来自一个小镇。

entries.text: Father fixed the broken chair in the garden while Mother cleaned the front door.
entries.translation_zh: 爸爸修好了花园里坏掉的椅子，妈妈把前门擦干净了。

entries.text: You should bring an umbrella because the radio said it might rain later today.
entries.translation_zh: 你应该带把伞，广播说今天晚些时候可能下雨。

entries.text: Our team practiced hard for weeks, so everyone was happy when we won.
entries.translation_zh: 我们队努力训练了好几周，所以赢的时候大家都很开心。

entries.text: She turned off the television and went to bed because she had an early class.
entries.translation_zh: 她关掉电视去睡觉了，因为第二天有早课。

entries.text: The library was so quiet that I could hear the clock ticking on the wall.
entries.translation_zh: 图书馆安静得我能听到墙上钟表的滴答声。

entries.text: After dinner we played cards with our cousins until it was time to go home.
entries.translation_zh: 晚饭后我们和表兄妹打牌，一直玩到该回家的时候。

entries.text: When I got home from school, I found that my little sister had already finished her homework and was helping our mother set the table for dinner.
entries.translation_zh: 我放学回家时，发现妹妹已经写完作业，正在帮妈妈摆桌子准备晚饭。

entries.text: My father showed me how to plant vegetables last spring, and this summer we got enough from the garden to share with everyone near our house.
entries.translation_zh: 去年春天爸爸教我种菜，今年夏天我们从园子里收获的蔬菜多到可以分给家附近的每个人。

entries.text: The school trip was canceled because of the storm, so the teachers showed us a film in the hall and let us play games in the afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 学校的郊游因暴风雨取消了，所以老师们在礼堂给我们放了电影，下午还让我们玩游戏。

entries.text: Every Sunday morning my family walks to the market near the river, where we buy fresh vegetables and sometimes stop for hot noodles at a small shop.
entries.translation_zh: 每个周日早上，我们全家步行去河边的市场买新鲜蔬菜，有时还会在一家小店停下来吃热面条。

entries.text: I was nervous about speaking in front of the whole class, but after the first minute I relaxed and even started to enjoy telling my story.
entries.translation_zh: 在全班面前讲话让我很紧张，但开始一分钟后我就放松了，甚至开始享受讲自己的故事。

entries.text: My grandmother says that when she was a girl, the town had no bus at all, and she had to walk a long way to school in every season.
entries.translation_zh: 奶奶说她小时候镇上根本没有公交车，无论什么季节她都得走很远的路去上学。

entries.text: We spent the whole afternoon looking for the cat, and in the end we found her sleeping quietly in a basket of clean clothes upstairs.
entries.translation_zh: 我们找了一下午的猫，最后发现她正安静地睡在楼上一篮干净衣服里。

entries.text: The new sports center near our school has a swimming pool, two basketball courts, and a running track, so everyone wants to go there after class.
entries.translation_zh: 我们学校附近新建的体育中心有游泳池、两个篮球场和一条跑道，所以大家放学后都想去那里。

entries.text: If you finish your homework before six, we can watch the football game together and order some chicken and rice from the place you like.
entries.translation_zh: 如果你六点前写完作业，我们就可以一起看足球比赛，再从你喜欢的那家店点鸡肉和米饭。

entries.text: On the first day of the holiday, we put bread and fruit in a bag, took the early train to the sea, and played on the beach until the evening.
entries.translation_zh: 假期第一天，我们把面包和水果装进包里，坐早班火车去海边，在沙滩上一直玩到傍晚。

entries.text: She practiced the piano every evening for a month, and when she finally played the song for her teacher, he smiled and clapped his hands.
entries.translation_zh: 她每天晚上练一个小时钢琴，坚持了一个月，当她终于给老师弹那首曲子时，老师笑着鼓起掌来。

entries.text: The little shop on the corner sells the best ice cream in town, and in summer there is always a long line outside the door.
entries.translation_zh: 街角的小店卖全城最好吃的冰淇淋，夏天门口总是排着长队。

entries.text: My brother lost his bus card on the way home, so he had to walk for an hour, and he was very hungry when he arrived.
entries.translation_zh: 我哥哥在回家路上丢了公交卡，只好走了一个小时，到家时已经饿坏了。

entries.text: Our teacher asked each of us to bring one old book to class so that we could open a small library by the window.
entries.translation_zh: 老师让我们每人带一本旧书到班里，这样我们就能在窗边开一个小图书角。

entries.text: It snowed all night, and in the morning the whole street was white, so the children ran outside to make a snowman before breakfast.
entries.translation_zh: 雪下了一整夜，早上整条街都白了，孩子们早饭前就跑出去堆雪人。

entries.text: I wanted to make my mother happy on her birthday, so I got up early, washed the dishes, and made her favorite breakfast.
entries.translation_zh: 我想在妈妈生日那天让她开心，所以早早起床洗了碗，还做了她最爱吃的早餐。

entries.text: The game was almost over when our team got the ball, and in the last minute we scored the goal that won the match.
entries.translation_zh: 比赛快结束时我们队拿到了球，在最后一分钟打进了制胜一球。

entries.text: During the summer holiday I read three books, learned to swim a little better, and helped my uncle paint the fence around his garden.
entries.translation_zh: 暑假期间我读了三本书，游泳学得更好了一点，还帮叔叔给他家花园的栅栏刷了漆。

entries.text: When the lights went out during the storm, we lit candles, sat together in the living room, and told stories until the power came back.
entries.translation_zh: 暴风雨导致停电时，我们点上蜡烛，一起坐在客厅里讲故事，直到来电。

entries.text: He saved his pocket money for half a year because he wanted to buy a present for his mother instead of asking his father for help.
entries.translation_zh: 他攒了半年零花钱，因为他想自己给妈妈买礼物，而不是向爸爸求助。

entries.text: The museum near the station is free on Friday afternoons, so our class is going there next week to see the old ships and maps.
entries.translation_zh: 车站附近的博物馆周五下午免费开放，所以我们班下周要去那里看古船和地图。

entries.text: My cousin is staying with us this month, and every evening after dinner we play table tennis in the yard until it gets dark.
entries.translation_zh: 我表弟这个月住在我们家，每天晚饭后我们都在院子里打乒乓球，直到天黑。

entries.text: She was afraid of dogs when she was small, but now she has a big friendly one that follows her everywhere she goes.
entries.translation_zh: 她小时候怕狗，但现在养了一只友善的大狗，走到哪儿都跟着她。

entries.text: We planted a small tree in front of the house five years ago, and now it is tall enough to give us shade in summer.
entries.translation_zh: 五年前我们在房前种了一棵小树，现在它已经高到能在夏天为我们遮荫了。

entries.text: The meeting has been moved to Thursday morning.
entries.translation_zh: 会议改到周四上午了。

entries.text: I finally finished my report at midnight.
entries.translation_zh: 我终于在午夜写完了报告。

entries.text: She applied for a part-time job last week.
entries.translation_zh: 她上周申请了一份兼职工作。

entries.text: The price of coffee here is quite reasonable.
entries.translation_zh: 这里的咖啡价格相当合理。

entries.text: Please check your email before the class starts.
entries.translation_zh: 上课前请查看你的邮箱。

entries.text: He often works late during the busy season.
entries.translation_zh: 旺季的时候他经常加班到很晚。

entries.text: Our flight was delayed by almost two hours.
entries.translation_zh: 我们的航班延误了将近两个小时。

entries.text: I'm trying to spend less time on my phone.
entries.translation_zh: 我在努力减少看手机的时间。

entries.text: The new shopping center opens next month.
entries.translation_zh: 新的购物中心下个月开业。

entries.text: Could you explain this question one more time?
entries.translation_zh: 你能把这道题再讲一遍吗？

entries.text: They offered her a position in the sales team.
entries.translation_zh: 他们给了她销售团队的一个职位。

entries.text: My laptop needs to be repaired again.
entries.translation_zh: 我的笔记本电脑又得修了。

entries.text: We should book the tickets as early as possible.
entries.translation_zh: 我们应该尽早订票。

entries.text: The lecture covered the history of modern art.
entries.translation_zh: 这次讲座讲了现代艺术史。

entries.text: He gave up smoking for the sake of his health.
entries.translation_zh: 为了健康他戒了烟。

entries.text: The hotel provides free breakfast for all guests.
entries.translation_zh: 这家酒店为所有客人提供免费早餐。

entries.text: I prefer reading news online to buying newspapers.
entries.translation_zh: 比起买报纸，我更喜欢在网上看新闻。

entries.text: Her presentation impressed everyone in the room.
entries.translation_zh: 她的演讲给在场的所有人留下了深刻印象。

entries.text: The library extends its hours during exam weeks.
entries.translation_zh: 考试周图书馆会延长开放时间。

entries.text: You can cancel the order within twenty-four hours.
entries.translation_zh: 你可以在二十四小时内取消订单。

entries.text: This app helps me manage my daily expenses.
entries.translation_zh: 这个应用帮我管理日常开支。

entries.text: The traffic downtown is very heavy on Friday nights.
entries.translation_zh: 周五晚上市中心的交通非常拥堵。

entries.text: He helps at the animal center every weekend.
entries.translation_zh: 他每个周末都在动物中心帮忙。

entries.text: The company plans to hire more engineers this year.
entries.translation_zh: 公司计划今年招聘更多工程师。

entries.text: I have to prepare a short speech for the welcome party at the end of the month.
entries.translation_zh: 我得为月底的欢迎会准备一个简短的发言。

entries.text: The customer service agent promised that the package would arrive within three working days.
entries.translation_zh: 客服人员承诺包裹会在三个工作日内送达。

entries.text: She decided to take an online course to improve her writing skills during the holiday.
entries.translation_zh: 她决定假期上一门网课来提高写作能力。

entries.text: The restaurant was fully booked, so we ended up trying the new place across the street.
entries.translation_zh: 那家餐厅订满了，所以我们最后去试了街对面的新店。

entries.text: If you want to join the gym, they are offering a discount for students this month.
entries.translation_zh: 如果你想办健身房会员，他们这个月对学生有折扣。

entries.text: My roommate said we should share the housework instead of fighting about it every week.
entries.translation_zh: 我室友说我们应该分担家务，而不是每周为此吵架。

entries.text: The manager asked everyone to submit their weekly reports before Friday afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 经理要求所有人在周五下午之前提交周报。

entries.text: It turns out that the noise upstairs was just my neighbor moving his furniture around.
entries.translation_zh: 原来楼上的噪音只是邻居在挪家具。

entries.text: I compared several brands online before deciding which washing machine to buy.
entries.translation_zh: 我在网上比较了几个品牌，才决定买哪台洗衣机。

entries.text: The doctor suggested that I take a break from running until my knee fully recovers.
entries.translation_zh: 医生建议我暂停跑步，直到膝盖完全恢复。

entries.text: We were supposed to meet at the cinema, but he went to the wrong one by mistake.
entries.translation_zh: 我们本来约好在电影院见面，但他错去了另一家。

entries.text: The university offers free counseling services to students who feel stressed during exams.
entries.translation_zh: 大学为考试期间感到压力的学生提供免费心理咨询。

entries.text: My internet connection kept dropping during the video call, which was really annoying.
entries.translation_zh: 视频通话时我的网络一直断，真的很烦人。

entries.text: They raised the rent again this year, so we are thinking about moving to a smaller place.
entries.translation_zh: 今年房租又涨了，所以我们在考虑搬到小一点的地方。

entries.text: He spent the whole weekend fixing his car instead of coming to the picnic with us.
entries.translation_zh: 他整个周末都在修车，没跟我们一起去野餐。

entries.text: The new policy allows employees to work from home two days a week.
entries.translation_zh: 新政策允许员工每周在家办公两天。

entries.text: I always make a shopping list before going to the supermarket so I don't overspend.
entries.translation_zh: 去超市前我总会列购物清单，以免超支。

entries.text: The staff on the plane helped me find space for my bags above the seat.
entries.translation_zh: 机上工作人员帮我在座位上方找到了放包的空间。

entries.text: She has been saving part of her salary every month for a trip to Europe next year.
entries.translation_zh: 她每个月都存下一部分工资，准备明年去欧洲旅行。

entries.text: The presentation went well, although I was extremely nervous at the beginning.
entries.translation_zh: 演讲进行得很顺利，虽然一开始我特别紧张。

entries.text: Our professor encourages us to ask questions whenever we don't understand the material.
